j2j3e
e.e1
j2j5d
Behavioral based tests for offsets and date_range.
This file is adapted from https://github.com/pandas-dev/pandas/pull/18761 -
which was more ambitious but less idiomatic in its use of Hypothesis.
You may wish to consult the previous version for inspiration on further
tests, or when trying to pin down the bugs exposed by the tests below.
assume
given
strategies)
Flaky)
	timezones)
	Timestamp)

	BMonthEnd

BQuarterEnd
BYearBegin
BYearEnd
MonthBegin
MonthEnd
QuarterBegin
QuarterEnd
	YearBegin
YearEnd
ignoreil
	min_value
	max_value

startZ
periods

	normalize

NonExistentTimeError)

compare

test_on_offset_implementations^
unreliable test timings)
strictZ
raises
reasonc
2017-10-30 12:00:00z
2017-11-06
US/Eastern)
endr
